race.comment: BAYWATCH (11) is off a let-up leading into this but looks an interesting contender for the Mick Kent yard, getting beyond a mile for the first time for a stable notoriously good with lightly raced stayers. She worked home fairly in a dash to the post behind Seafall last start and will find this easier. THE MANSMAN (5) is going okay in three runs this time in and should be ready to show something now. RASP (1) wasn't far away in a bunched finish last time. He can mix his form a bit but is certainly up to this grade. BALLISTIC ROMEO (6) comes through the same Flemington race as FENESTELLA, also struggling having bolted in with a maiden prior. Can bounce right back.
